control_objectives.name: Build and Maintain a Secure Network and Systems

requirements.title: Install and Maintain Network Security Controls
requirements.description: Establish and manage firewalls, routers, and network segmentation to block unauthorised access into the CDE.

requirements.title: Apply Secure Configurations to All System Components
requirements.description: Eliminate vendor-supplied defaults. Remove unnecessary software, functions, accounts. Disable unneeded services.

requirements.title: Protect Stored Account Data
requirements.description: Encrypt, truncate, mask, or tokenise PAN. Strong key management. Data retention policies must minimise storage.

requirements.title: Protect Cardholder Data with Strong Cryptography During Transmission
requirements.description: Use strong cryptography (TLS 1.2+) when transmitting payment data across public networks.

requirements.title: Protect All Systems and Networks from Malicious Software
requirements.description: Deploy and regularly update anti-malware solutions. Periodic scans and real-time monitoring.

requirements.title: Develop and Maintain Secure Systems and Software
requirements.description: Secure coding practices, vulnerability management, timely patching, WAFs, and change control.

requirements.title: Restrict Access by Business Need to Know
requirements.description: Least-privilege and need-to-know access control. All access documented and audited. RBAC required.

requirements.title: Identify Users and Authenticate Access
requirements.description: Unique user IDs. MFA for remote and CDE access. Strong password policies (min 12 chars). Inactive accounts disabled within 90 days.

requirements.title: Restrict Physical Access to Cardholder Data
requirements.description: Building entry controls, secure server rooms, surveillance, visitor management, media destruction, POI device security.

requirements.title: Log and Monitor All Access to System Components and Cardholder Data
requirements.description: Track and analyse all network and system activity. Logs retained 12 months (3 months immediately available).

requirements.title: Test Security of Systems and Networks Regularly
requirements.description: Quarterly ASV scans, internal scans, annual penetration testing, IDS/IPS, file integrity monitoring.

requirements.title: Support Information Security with Organisational Policies and Programs
requirements.description: Comprehensive security policy. Annual risk assessment. Security awareness training. Incident response plan. TPM management.
